NAVAREA XIX 53/17
SEISMIC SURVEY FROM 10 JUN TO 20 JUL BY WG COLUMBUS-5BNS2
VESSEL IS TOWING 8 X 3800 METER SEISMIC CABLES IN AREA B0UND BY.
A.66-43.0N 010-56.0E
B.67-06.0N 009-27.0E
C.66-44.0N 008-45.0E
D.66-56.0N 007-57.0E
E.66-14.0N 006-32.0E
F.65.33.0N 008-57.0E
VESSEL REQUIRE A MINIMUM SAFETY DISTANCE OF 3 NM
GUARD VESSEL WG MAGELLAN, BRAVO SAPHIRE AND STORM WEST.
